purpose_context: Spec Kitty resolves each mission type's rules, steps, and gates through two parallel trees with a hardcoded software-dev bias, so documentation, research, and plan missions can silently inherit software-development doctrine. This mission makes the doctrine MissionType artefact the load-bearing source of truth — routing governance, gates, and steps through one charter-mediated path and closing that leak — as the first slice of retiring the duplicate specify_cli tree.
purpose_tldr: Make the doctrine the single source of truth for what a mission type is, so non-software missions stop inheriting software-dev rules.
